# Sultan Cement Products | سلطان للمنتجات الأسمنتية

Sultan Cement Products sells and delivers two product categories only: Interlock paving products and Kerbstones. The business is located in Misfah As Safil, Muscat, Sultanate of Oman.

سلطان للمنتجات الأسمنتية يبيع ويوصل فئتين فقط من المنتجات: الإنترلوك والكربستون. يقع النشاط في المسفاة السفلى، مسقط، سلطنة عُمان.

## Products

- Interlock paving products in the sizes, colours and finishes shown in the current catalogue.
- Garden and road Kerbstones in the sizes and finishes shown in the current catalogue.

## Ordering and delivery

Customers can request current availability, pricing and delivery details by WhatsApp. A useful enquiry includes the product name, size, quantity and delivery location.

## Contact

- Orders and WhatsApp: +968 9417 8871
- Additional phone: +968 9427 6767
- Location: F7X6+X5, Misfah As Safil, Muscat, Oman
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/aPfkAR3k5hCSCZeQ8?g_st=iw
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sultan.interlock?igsh=OWl6ZWYwY3oybnZz

For accurate availability, prices and delivery arrangements, contact Sultan Cement Products directly.
